_meta.description: WS4-prep golden baseline for department inference — a pure reference oracle. Captures CURRENT behavior (bugs included) plus the post-C2 writerPath_threaded reference and writerPathGap. Regenerate with --update; any inferDepartment diff during WS4 must be reviewed. C2 call-site changes leave this harness GREEN and are verified by the live re-promotion test, not here.
